code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut last = ""
mut found = false
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let at_end = i == n
  mut is_nl = false
  if not at_end
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        is_nl = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if at_end or is_nl
    let line = string.substring(input, start, i)
    mut endp = string.len(line)
    mut stripping = true
    while stripping
      if endp == 0
        stripping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, endp - 1)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
            endp = endp - 1
          else
            stripping = false
          end
        when None
          stripping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if endp > 0
      last = line
      found = true
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println(last)
else
  println("(none)")
end
